items.description: If evaluation is required but missing, the conversion must ask or fail closed rather than invent evaluation semantics.
items.evidence_expected: A review fixture with required-but-absent evaluation confirms an explicit question or blocked result and no invented validation loader or metric.

items.description: Checkpoint loading must use torch.load with weights_only=True for untrusted PyTorch checkpoint input.
items.evidence_expected: Static inspection of generated checkpoint-loading code confirms weights_only=True and no unrestricted pickle load.

items.description: TensorFlow and other non-PyTorch skills must not load nvflare-shared/references/pytorch-model-exchange.md.
items.evidence_expected: A bounded static reference scan shows that only PyTorch-family conversion skills reference the PyTorch model-exchange guidance.

items.description: A generated server/client state-dict mismatch against the unchanged source model must be treated as a conversion bug, while a mismatch already present in user input is an incompatible-input blocker.
items.evidence_expected: A post-conversion mismatch fixture produces a blocked conversion or repair to generated model construction without architecture substitution or misattribution to the supplied input.
